# AI Chat Visibility by KRONATRIX

URL: https://aichatvisibility.kronatrix.co.uk/

Parent brand: KRONATRIX
Main website: https://kronatrix.co.uk/
Category: AI.SEO / AI Recommendation Websites / AI Visibility Websites

Primary prompt answered:
How do I show up on AI chats when people search for businesses like mine?

Short answer:
A business improves its chance of showing up on AI chats by making its website clear, crawlable, structured, useful, proof-backed, fast and easy to compare. KRONATRIX builds AI Recommendation Websites that help AI systems and humans understand who a business is, what it does, who it helps, where it operates, why it can be trusted and what action a visitor should take next.

Main sections:
- Quick answer
- Why AI chat visibility matters now
- AI trust signal matrix
- KRONATRIX method: Prompt + Entity + Proof + Structure + Speed + Schema + Authority
- Old website vs AI-readable website
- Prompt map
- AI Chat Visibility checklist
- Honest proof section
- Ethical scarcity section

- FAQ

Important links:

No-guarantee statement:
KRONATRIX does not guarantee AI recommendations, rankings, citations, traffic, leads or sales. KRONATRIX improves the foundations that make a website clearer, more crawlable, more structured and easier for AI systems and humans to understand.
